name: Pureed Vegetable Soup with Broccoli Florets
recipeInstructions:
Garnish (optional): minced fresh parsley, a dash of paprika, minced fresh chives, grated cheese, sliced almonds, or finely diced sweet red peppers.
In a Dutch oven or large pot, combine potatoes, celery, carrots, onion, garlic, vegetable stock, and seasonings. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the vegetables are very tender, about 10 minutes (ensure the potatoes are fully cooked for proper thickening).
While the soup is simmering, steam the broccoli florets.
Transfer the simmered vegetables and broth into a food processor, blending until smooth. Return the pureed mixture to the pot.
Stir in the broccoli florets. In a separate measuring cup, combine any remaining ingredients (egg yolk, soy sauce). Add these back to the soup and stir gently; avoid boiling. Serve with garnish if desired.
